<!-- Chart CH-PTW-09 SUNBURST, role-based (themeable) -->

## SUNBURST chart (CH-PTW-09)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-PTW-09",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "part-to-whole",
    "composition"
  ],
  "form": "two concentric rings: groups inside, children outside",
  "data_required": "a strict 2-level hierarchy: 2-4 groups, 2-4 children each",
  "family": "PTW",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-PTW-05 (one level, honest areas)",
    "CH-PTW-01 (few parts, exact)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "one level of hierarchy",
      "use": "CH-PTW-05"
    },
    {
      "when": "shares must be compared precisely",
      "use": "CH-PTW-02"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- WARN: only when a 2-level whole must be shown in one figure
- hierarchical composition where both levels matter at once

Do NOT use when:
- angle comparison across rings (humans cannot)
- more than 2 levels (unreadable)
- small shares (labels vanish)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "share unit",
  "groups": "[{name, children: [{name, value}]}]"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 56,

    },
    "kicker": {

      "h": 4
    },
    "eyebrow": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 52,
      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "cx": 430,
    "cy": 320,
    "r_hole": 55,
    "r_inner": 110,
    "r_outer": 175,
    "label": {
      "size": 11,
      "offset": 10
    }
  }
}
```

### Rules
- exactly two rings; children sum to their group
- shares printed on outer labels; tiny slices stay silent
- groups colored by the monochrome ramp, children by a lighter mix

### Never do this
- WARN ENTRY: a treemap (CH-PTW-05) answers the same question with readable areas
- 3+ rings
- rainbow slices
- donut-hole KPIs stuffed in the middle

### QA before delivering
- [ ] two rings exactly
- [ ] children sum to groups
- [ ] shares printed where they fit
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| label | body |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
